# Transcrição: 89. Urgency is the NEW Virtue 

- **Fonte:** 89. Urgency is the NEW Virtue 
- **Duração:** 01:56
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:56]

Let's face it, everybody's got two cents and everybody's got two minutes. So here's my two cents and under two minutes. Hey Grant Cardone here, New York Times bestselling author and I'm here to talk to you today about this concept of patience and urgency. Look here's the reality. 200 years ago you could afford to be patient. This is where this came from. Patience is a virtue. Why? Because you had a horse, you had an ox, you had a small village, you had a limited number of people to help you with projects. You didn't have sophisticated machinery. 200 years ago it was like, hey man, let's be patient. It's going to take a little while to build this house. But that was 200 years ago. Fast forward 200 years ago to right now. Look, patience is no longer a virtue. It disables you. It stops you from being competitive in the marketplace, much less dominating the marketplace. Today it's about urgency. Remember 200 years ago there was a sundial. Today what is there? A second hand. People are measuring seconds now, not hours or where the sun moves. You have to be urgent. Urgent. Urgency is the new virtue of the 21st century. To push, to get things done, to accomplish a task. This is what you need to do for your family today. This patience is a virtue concept. While it was good 200 years ago, maybe even 100 years ago in the 1800s and maybe even in the early 1900s it will not suffice you in this marketplace today. Look, if patience is a virtue, man, what is urgency? It is a quality of the gods, of the most productive people on the planet. Snap their fingers, get something done, move on to the next task. That's what you want to be. You want to be in power. Speed is power. Don't buy this patience as a virtue thing. It's over. It's outdated. Urgency is the new virtue of business people, entrepreneurs, and those of you who want to take care of your families in the biggest and most prosperous way you can. Urgency is the new virtue.
